markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.171 — Application of Subchapter

This subchapter applies only if the department implements a titling system under Section 501.173 (Electronic Titling System) .

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 70, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: This subchapter applies only if the department implements a titling system under Section 501.173 (Electronic Titling System) .
